Requirements

Requirements

1. Video Title

  • Do not include "SysInfo" or any product names (e.g. Phase R6) in your title. Doing so will result in a copyright strike.

2. Video Description

  • Use the exact description below. Do not add, remove, or change anything. Replace "YOUR CHANNEL NAME" with your YouTube name.
🛒Links: https://linktr.ee/sysinfocheats

    ⚠️PLEASE READ & WATCH THE FULL VIDEO!!⚠️
    LIKE and SUBSCRIBE with NOTIFICATIONS ON: if you enjoyed the video! 👍

    ⚠️ PLEASE READ: ⚠️
    🔍YOU MUST READ / UNDERSTAND THIS INFORMATION! 
    Attention Viewers: Before proceeding, please understand that it's crucial to emphasize that we do not condone, endorse, or promote cheating in any form. Our reviews are conducted solely for educational and entertainment purposes, trying to analyze cheat effectiveness and educate viewers about potential vulnerabilities in gaming environments. To help people not get scammed, banned or sued. It's essential to understand that cheating violates the TERMS OF SERVICE of most gaming platforms & company's. This, can lead to severe consequences, including bans and account termination. I DO NOT take responsibility for YOUR actions. This video contains footage and discussions related to Spoofers & HWID Bans. We urge viewers to use this content responsibly and to prioritize fair play and integrity in gaming. Please note that any attempt to replicate the actions or methods showcased in this video may result in disciplinary action by game developers or platform administrators.
    Thank you for your understanding and commitment to upholding the principles of fair play in the gaming community. - 
    -
    🔔 Copyright Disclaimer Under Section 107 of the Copyright Act 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing. Non-profit, educational or personal use tips the balance in favor of fair use. No copyright infringement intended. ALL RIGHTS BELONG TO THEIR RESPECTIVE OWNERS

    ✅This video contains footage and discussions related to cheats and hacks in the gaming industry. We urge viewers to use this content responsibly and to prioritize fair play and integrity in gaming.

    🤝Thank you for your understanding and commitment to upholding the principles of fair play in the gaming community.

3. Additional Requirements

Fake Views
Botted or paid views (including TikTok promotion) are strictly forbidden. Offenders will be permanently banned and lose all future rewards.
Video Visibility
Only public videos are valid. Unlisted or private videos do not count. If a video is removed by copyright, it will still count as long as you provide screenshot proof of its final view count.
Content Policy
Once accepted, you may only post sys-info.xyz content across all platforms. Posting for other brands after joining will result in rank removal and loss of access.
Video Length
YouTube videos must be longer than 2 minutes.

4. Join Discord

Join our Discord server to get the latest updates and to get in touch with the media community. You can join the Discord server by clicking the button below.
Join Discord

Coupon Uses

Coupon Uses
How It Works
We no longer base rankings on views, (except in special cases discussed privately).
Once you pass the trial stage, you'll receive a 5% off coupon code to include in your content.
Your rank will increase based on the number of times your code is used (e.g., 5 uses = Standard Creator, 10 = Advanced Creator).
Rewards
To view rewards based on coupon use, check the creator tier cards above for detailed information about earnings and benefits at each level.
